questions.question: Calculation / quantitative question for Travel Consultant (Itinerary planning) while handling 'Book travel packages': Food cost £4.50, selling price £14. What is gross food margin %?
questions.why_asked: Tests numerical and analytical competence in Itinerary planning — essential for Travel Consultant roles.

calculation.prompt: Food cost £4.50, selling price £14. What is gross food margin %?
calculation.answer: Margin = (14 − 4.50) / 14 × 100 = 67.9%. Monitor against target; if labour is high, contribution still may be insufficient.

evaluation_criteria: (Price − cost) / price
Express as %
Link to total GP
common_mistakes: Unit conversion errors (kN vs N, mg vs g).
Using wrong formula for support/loading conditions.
Quoting tabulated values without verifying edition/date of standard.
